errors.unsupportedCurrency: Currency {currency} is not supported. Supported currencies: ETB, USD, EUR, GBP.
errors.gatewayNotSupported: Payment provider {provider} does not support currency {currency}.
errors.consentRequired: Payment consent is required under GDPR. Please agree to the terms before proceeding.
errors.alreadyProcessed: This transaction has already been processed and cannot be modified.
errors.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe payment processing is not configured. Please contact support.
errors.providerNotImplemented: Payment provider {provider} is not yet implemented.
errors.notRefundable: Only completed transactions can be refunded.
errors.refundExceedsAmount: Refund amount exceeds the original transaction amount.

success.deleted: Payment data anonymized successfully per GDPR request.
